name: Kahlua Fudge Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 9-inch square pan and line it with foil.
2. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
3. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. Melt butter and chocolate over low heat.
5. Beat eggs and sugar until light in consistency.
6. Add the sifted dry ingredients, chocolate mixture, and 1/4 cup Kahlua; blend well.
7. Stir in chopped nuts.
8. Pour batter into prepared pan.
9. Bake for 30 minutes or until the top springs back lightly when touched gently in the center, and edges begin to pull away from the pan.
10. Remove from oven and let cool thoroughly in the pan.
11. Brush top with remaining Kahlua.
12. Cut into 1 x 2-inch bars.
13. Garnish if desired.
